title: Historical Host Trial Publication Or Second Bounded Trial Decision
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 host-trial publication-or-second-bounded-trial decision slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-015` host-trial publication-or-second-bounded-trial decision slice
objective: Determine whether the Packet 014 host-created handoff should now be published through `C:/APEX Platform` or whether one additional bounded documentation-first or planning-first host-side trial should run before publication, using Packet 014 evidence to select the smallest truthful next packet without approving migration or mutating runtime surfaces.
dependency_note: Packet 014 proved that one documentation-only host-side edit can be executed from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` without runtime mutation, but it also left a host-created handoff artifact unpublished and uncommitted. This packet exists to choose whether the smallest truthful next move is parent-root publication of that artifact or one more bounded documentation/planning-only host-side trial before publication.
required_inputs: The Packet 014 ruling that the first bounded host-side documentation edit passed cleanly and remained reversible
The current workstation parent-root state at `C:/APEX Platform`, including the unrelated `.vercelignore` and the mirrored Packet 014 handoff
The current prepared host mirror state at `/home/olares/code/apex` on `clean-main` at `16fe398bfcd74a8cace69fcadeb0193e43f28558`, with only the Packet 014 handoff artifact newly untracked
The governing parent-root publication boundary at `C:/APEX Platform`
constrained_outputs: A dated decision handoff stating whether Packet 014's host-created handoff should be published now or whether one additional bounded documentation/planning-only host-side trial should run first
A recorded statement of the single next packet recommended from that decision and why
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review the Packet 014 handoff and confirm the trial passed with no runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and only one new host-side untracked artifact.
Review parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform` and confirm any potential publication decision would need to stay bounded to the mirrored Packet 014 handoff and related authority surfaces only.
Determine whether immediate bounded parent-root publication is smaller and truer than running one more bounded documentation/planning-only host-side trial first.
If considering a second trial, keep it documentation-first or planning-first, reversible, and explicitly narrower than application-source editing or migration.
Write a dated decision handoff naming the single recommended next packet and preserving all no-go boundaries.

Stop if the decision would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting change, or execution of publication or trial work inside this packet.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes a bounded technical-authority decision only. It does not authorize database writes, publication execution, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as the bounded post-trial decision lane. Decision: publish the Packet 014 host-created handoff through a bounded parent-root publication and host-mirror resync gate before any second host-side trial. Reason: Packet 014 already proved one documentation-only host edit, and running another trial before publication would increase unpublished host drift rather than restore authority hygiene.
next_action: Open Olares Phase 5 016 - Packet 014 Artifact Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate. Keep the packet limited to bounded parent-root publication and fast-forward-only host mirror resync; exclude .vercelignore and do not approve migration, runtime mutation, AI-services work, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or old-clone mutation.
